title: Create Chaos
description: This modpack includes most of Create Mod's addons, along with a few quality of life mods to allow for well, quality of life. (Original Create Mod logo used as a main template)
body:
# Create Chaos
You want a modpack that's both crazy, and has create? Well say no more, Create Chaos is the perfect modpack. I mean, take a look at this list of what's included in this modpack.\
We have:
- Too many Create Addons with more and more getting installed every update. 
- Storage mods such as AE2, Storage Drawers, and the entire Sophisticated Storage collection.
- A handful of technology mods, such as AE2, CC: Tweaked, Easy Villagers/Piglins.
- A couple of magic mods, like Botania with its addons, and Ars Nouveau with its addons and more to come.
- A few QOL Mods for of course, quality of life.
- A few weapon mods, because after all, why shouldn't you have weapons to use.
- Space Travel to conquer new planets using Ad Astra with a plethora of addons to ensure you don't get bored.
- And last but not least, far too many optimization mods, but let's be honest, we always need more optimization.
-------------------------
***You think you're crazy?\
Think again.***
